evals.prompt: In src/components/Hero.tsx, implement Expo Router Stack transition behavior for a product surface and explain the validation gates.
evals.expected_output: Uses native-controls-transitions routing, checks installed versions, applies domain-specific Expo UI guidance, runs or recommends the bundled audit CLI where relevant, and reports validation evidence.
assertions: Mentions the relevant installed package/runtime/version checks for Expo UI.
Uses at least one native-controls-transitions bundled reference or explains why no extra reference was needed.
Includes reduced-motion/accessibility or explains why the effect is essential and already covered.

Includes cleanup/interruption/runtime validation appropriate to Expo Router Stack/native-stack transitions, react-native-screens boundaries, Expo UI SwiftUI/Jetpack Compose controls, native control animation ownership, and validation.
Does not route the task to an unrelated near-miss skill.
